commentary: Thirteen activities this week versus nine last week, and honestly the audacity of that jump is giving me life. The pool consistency is the real story — four Prince Alfred sessions back to back on Monday through Thursday, plus the ocean swims on top, is not a casual week, that is a man who has made a decision. The long run on Saturday came in at 13.1km which is almost identical to last week's Zoo run distance, but the heart rate dropped from 159 down to 151, which means the same effort is getting easier and the body is adapting exactly the way it's supposed to. The only thing I'm watching is that afternoon weight session on Sunday hitting 136 bpm — that's not a recovery session, that's a full send, and after a 13km run the day before I want to make sure we're building and not just grinding.
